summary: The diff implements all five requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-5) with good coverage. Backend GameType includes memoryTest, migration module is provided, useMemoryTest hook is created, MemoryTestGame page exists, App.tsx registers /memory-test route, HomePage adds the game card below existing ones, and difficultyConfig.ts has 5 levels for memoryTest. The required image asset (memory-test-icon.dim_128x128.png) is referenced in HomePage but its actual file addition is not evidenced in the diff. One hallucinated file (urlParams.ts) appears added but was likely a pre-existing or unrelated file.

missing_requirements.requirement: Memory test game icon image file (memory-test-icon.dim_128x128.png) must be present as a static asset
missing_requirements.reason: The image is referenced in HomePage.tsx as '/assets/generated/memory-test-icon.dim_128x128.png' but no image file addition is shown in the diff. The build request explicitly requires this image.

hallucinated_features.description: Addition of frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts as a new file containing URL parameter utility functions (getUrlParameter, storeSessionParameter, getSessionParameter, getPersistedUrlParameter, clearSessionParameter, clearParamFromHash)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request any URL parameter utility module. This file appears in the ADDED FILES section but is unrelated to the Memory Test game feature.
